name: Mixed Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 generous tablespoons Kozlowski Farms South of the Border no fat Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse 1 can each of garbanzo beans, great northern beans (white), pinto beans, kidney beans, and lentils.
2. Add the prepared ingredients to a large bowl.
3. Mix in 1 package of Lipton's French Onion soup.
4. Stir in 2 generous tablespoons of Kozlowski Farms South of the Border no fat Dressing.
5. Fold in 3 tablespoons of Hain's honey barbecue sauce.
6. Serve hot, turning off heat when ready to serve.
